messages.content: what's up, sis? How's life, any hustle lately?
cuase I decided to hit the gym finally
Hiiii. I'm good, nothing special... Yet. Working on my diploma, still planning to go to that bootYcamp next month.
Damn, this is THE girliest dumbbell I ever saw. You both look very cure.
*cute
That's good, I'm glad you have something going on at least. I already hate everything relate to damn bridges, but I'm feeling good about my progress -i'm alr ahead of my classmates
niiice, at least someone in the family will have master's😭
Naah, you will do alright next year, I'm sure. keep believing
Btw, if you need any gym pointers, just ask.
yeah that was my plan actualy. i'm looking around, stalking other people and their exercises hehe
so i just saw a girl, she was doing this "sit up and sit down" thingies with a lot of plates.
her legs were HUGE, i should heve make a sneak pic lol
Like squats?
ig. like this, not sure i'm doing it right
could you tell if i'm doing ok here?
Hard to tell from this, but I see that it's not centered on your shoulders.
aaaah, embarrassed myself on the easiest thing😑
i'll just go and ask that girl around, she looks like she knows her shit :D
Ok, i'm going to work on my diploma for a bit, but if you need help - buzz me
kk thanks
aaaaaaa, tired af
Ahaha, you good? don't try too hard, you're  just starting
naaah, 'im fine. that was really nice, that girl lifts for 3 years, she showed me a LOT today
mb a bit too much even eeeh
but i'm very happy with myself, feeling great
and super hungie
this is the nastiest dinner I ever had!
Girl, da hell? You not gonna eat all that🥴
pfff, watch me
well, i couldn't finish it all, but i was pretty close
eating after the gym is my new favorite thing🍗🍗🍗🍗👅
